from flask import Flask, request, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)

class TransferService:
    def __init__(self, db):
        self.db = db

    def execute(self, from_account, to_account, amount):
        with self.db.transaction():
            self.db.execute("UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance - ? WHERE id = ?",
                          (amount, from_account))
            self.db.execute("UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance + ? WHERE id = ?",
                          (amount, to_account))
            self.db.execute("INSERT INTO transfers (from_id, to_id, amount) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
                          (from_account, to_account, amount))

class OrderService:
    def __init__(self, db):
        self.db = db

    def create(self, user_id, total, product_id):
        with self.db.transaction():
            self.db.execute("INSERT INTO orders (user_id, total) VALUES (?, ?)",
                          (user_id, total))
            self.db.execute("UPDATE inventory SET qty = qty - 1 WHERE product_id = ?",
                          (product_id,))

transfer_service = TransferService(get_db())
order_service = OrderService(get_db())

@app.route("/transfer", methods=["POST"])
def transfer_funds():
    data = request.get_json()
    try:
        transfer_service.execute(data["from"], data["to"], data["amount"])
    except Exception:
        return jsonify({"error": "transfer failed"}), 500
    return jsonify({"status": "completed"})

@app.route("/orders", methods=["POST"])
def create_order():
    data = request.get_json()
    try:
        order_service.create(data["user_id"], data["total"], data["product_id"])
    except Exception:
        return jsonify({"error": "order failed"}), 500
    return jsonify({"status": "created"})
